title: middletonia regularis
side_effects: Middletonia regularis can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure due to its stimulant properties, which can lead to cardiovascular issues in individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. Additionally, prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can cause insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness due to its high caffeine content. In rare cases, Middletonia regularis can also cause allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in individuals who are sensitive to its chemical composition. Furthermore, its diuretic properties can cause dehydration and electrolyte imbalances if not properly monitored and managed.
